'''âm-n-d''' ('''manada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backburner|backburner]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-n-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backburner|backburner]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-n-d
|-
! Lemma
| manada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:manadithi|manadithi]] || [[word:manadiji|manadiji]] || [[word:manadishi|manadishi]] || [[word:manadi|manadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:manaduthuth|manaduthuth]] || [[word:manadujuj|manadujuj]] || [[word:manadushush|manadushush]] || [[word:manad|manad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:manaduthu|manaduthu]] || [[word:manaduju|manaduju]] || [[word:manadushu|manadushu]] || [[word:manadu|manadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:manadufuth|manadufuth]] || [[word:manadufuj|manadufuj]] || [[word:manadufush|manadufush]] || [[word:manaduf|manaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:manadethe|manadethe]] || [[word:manadeje|manadeje]] || [[word:manadeshe|manadeshe]] || [[word:manade|manade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:manadothoth|manadothoth]] || [[word:manadojoj|manadojoj]] || [[word:manadoshosh|manadoshosh]] || [[word:manad|manad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:manadotho|manadotho]] || [[word:manadojo|manadojo]] || [[word:manadosho|manadosho]] || [[word:manado|manado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:manadofoth|manadofoth]] || [[word:manadofoj|manadofoj]] || [[word:manadofosh|manadofosh]] || [[word:manadof|manadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:manadĂŠthĂŠ|manadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:manadĂŠjĂŠ|manadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:manadĂŠshĂŠ|manadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:manadĂŠ|manadĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:manadathath|manadathath]] || [[word:manadajaj|manadajaj]] || [[word:manadashash|manadashash]] || [[word:manad|manad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:manadatha|manadatha]] || [[word:manadaja|manadaja]] || [[word:manadasha|manadasha]] || [[word:manada|manada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:manadafath|manadafath]] || [[word:manadafaj|manadafaj]] || [[word:manadafash|manadafash]] || [[word:manadaf|manadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:manadasha|manadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomanadasha|gomanadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimanadasha|gokimanadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:manadnĂŒsha|manadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomanadnknĂŒsha|gomanadnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimanadnĂŒsha|gokimanadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:manadshĂ«sha|manadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomanadnkshĂ«sha|gomanadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimanadshĂ«sha|gokimanadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:manadrosha|manadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomanadnkrosha|gomanadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimanadrosha|gokimanadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:manadmusha|manadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomanadnkmusha|gomanadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimanadmusha|gokimanadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:manadsherasha|manadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomanadnksherasha|gomanadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimanadsherasha|gokimanadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:manadngasha|manadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomanadnkngasha|gomanadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimanadngasha|gokimanadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:manadyasha|manadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomanadnkyasha|gomanadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimanadyasha|gokimanadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:manadyamasha|manadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomanadnkyamasha|gomanadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimanadyamasha|gokimanadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:manadnĂŒshĂ«sha|manadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomanadnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gomanadnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimanadnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokimanadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:manadnĂŒrosha|manadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomanadnknĂŒrosha|gomanadnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimanadnĂŒrosha|gokimanadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:manadnĂŒmusha|manadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomanadnknĂŒmusha|gomanadnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimanadnĂŒmusha|gokimanadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:manadshĂ«nĂŒsha|manadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomanadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gomanadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimanadshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokimanadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:manadshĂ«rosha|manadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomanadnkshĂ«rosha|gomanadnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimanadshĂ«rosha|gokimanadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:manadshĂ«musha|manadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomanadnkshĂ«musha|gomanadnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimanadshĂ«musha|gokimanadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:manadronĂŒsha|manadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomanadnkronĂŒsha|gomanadnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimanadronĂŒsha|gokimanadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:manadroshĂ«sha|manadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomanadnkroshĂ«sha|gomanadnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimanadroshĂ«sha|gokimanadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:manadromusha|manadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomanadnkromusha|gomanadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimanadromusha|gokimanadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:manadmunĂŒsha|manadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomanadnkmunĂŒsha|gomanadnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimanadmunĂŒsha|gokimanadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:manadmushĂ«sha|manadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomanadnkmushĂ«sha|gomanadnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimanadmushĂ«sha|gokimanadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:manadmurosha|manadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomanadnkmurosha|gomanadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimanadmurosha|gokimanadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:manad|manad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:mĂŠnĂŠd|mĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homanad|homanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:homĂŠnĂŠd|homĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomanad|hohomanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomĂŠnĂŠd|hohomĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒmanad|nĂŒmanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒmĂŠnĂŠd|nĂŒmĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmanad|nĂŒnĂŒmanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠnĂŠd|nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻmanad|nĂŻmanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻmĂŠnĂŠd|nĂŻmĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmanad|nĂŻnĂŻmanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠnĂŠd|nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumanad|lumanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lumĂŠnĂŠd|lumĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumanad|lulumanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumĂŠnĂŠd|lulumĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limanad|limanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:limĂŠnĂŠd|limĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimanad|lilimanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimĂŠnĂŠd|lilimĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komanad|komanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:komĂŠnĂŠd|komĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomanad|kokomanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomĂŠnĂŠd|kokomĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemanad|kemanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kemĂŠnĂŠd|kemĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemanad|kekemanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemĂŠnĂŠd|kekemĂŠnĂŠd]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
